title: dioscorea cayenensis var. praehensilis
intro: Dioscorea cayenensis var. praehensilis, also known as wild yam or Chinese yam, is a type of plant species belonging to the Dioscoreaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the adrenal glands and promote the production of progesterone, making it a popular ingredient in herbal supplements for women's health. The health benefits of Dioscorea cayenensis var. praehensilis include alleviating menopausal symptoms, reducing inflammation, and supporting immune function. Dioscorea cayenensis var. praehensilis can be prepared into herbal supplements, such as capsules or tablets, or used in traditional medicine to make teas and tinctures.
